comment.body:
ONE THING I TELL YOU:
whenever you read the news, or hear politicans to speak... you can be sure in one thing: they are acting. They always do. Just like in poker, you can't show your hands.
Media is not a window to the world. It is the curtain on the window! - I always say that.

All those monologes and interviews are prepared, prescripted, practiced and acted.
They are playing for the sentiment to favor to them. Bcs they need support. They need the mass, the majority. Even if it is only 51% (so +1 bps)

So whenever you watch/read the news: read them, and then ask yourself: What is he stating? Why now? What is the context? And based on these what can be the underlying purpose of the speech? Read betweein the lines.. but mostly read the timing.

Timing is always key. 
Play a 3D chess. And you will get it. 
Read, learn, think.
